Off Calendar Dec-31-2018 Continued To Apr-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Laurie Shigekuni, by CourtCall, for petitioner Minnie Yuen.

The Court noted that the petitioner either needed to file a petition for approval of status report or a petition for final distribution.. Ms. Shigekuni responded that she expected to have the petition for final distribution filed within the next two months. The matter was continued to April 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)
